ref.pp:
/-!
# HigherOrder attribute

This file defines the `@[higher_order]` attribute that applies to lemmas of the shape
`∀ x, f (g x) = h x`. It derives an auxiliary lemma of the form `f ∘ g = h` for reasoning about
higher-order functions.
-/
open Lean Name Meta Elab Expr Term
ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "higher_order"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `optional  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

ParserDescr.node  `Lean.Parser.Attr.higherOrder  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "higher_order"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `optional  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

ParserDescr.node  `Lean.Parser.Attr.higherOrder  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "higher_order"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `optional  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

@[  attr_parser  1000  ]  public  meta  def higherOrder :  Lean.ParserDescr  :=  ParserDescr.node  `Lean.Parser.Attr.higherOrder  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "higher_order"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `optional  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

ref.pp:
match  @  x  with | .app f e =>
     clear%  x  ; if e.equal v then
      return f
    else do
      if v.occurs f then
        throwError "mkComp failed occurs check"
      let e' ← mkComp v e
      mkAppM ``Function.comp #[f, e']
  | e =>  clear%  x  ; do
    guard (e.equal v)
    let t ← inferType e
    mkAppOptM ``id #[t]

    else do

/-- `mkComp v e` checks whether `e` is a sequence of nested applications `f (g (h v))`, and if so,
returns the expression `f ∘ g ∘ h`. If `e = v` it returns `id`. -/
def mkComp (v : Expr) : Expr → MetaM Expr
  | .app f e =>
    if e.equal v then
      return f
    else do
      if v.occurs f then
        throwError "mkComp failed occurs check"
      let e' ← mkComp v e
      mkAppM ``Function.comp #[f, e']
  | e => do
    guard (e.equal v)
    let t ← inferType e
    mkAppOptM ``id #[t]

/--
From a lemma of the shape `∀ x, f (g x) = h x`
derive an auxiliary lemma of the form `f ∘ g = h`
for reasoning about higher-order functions.
-/
partial def mkHigherOrderType (e : Expr) : MetaM Expr := do
  if not e.isForall then
    throwError "not a forall"
  withLocalDecl e.bindingName! e.binderInfo e.bindingDomain! fun fvar => do
    let body := instantiate1 e.bindingBody! fvar
    if body.isForall then
      let exp ← mkHigherOrderType body
      mkForallFVars #[fvar] exp (binderInfoForMVars := e.binderInfo)
    else
      let some (_, lhs, rhs) ← matchEq? body | throwError "not an equality {← ppExpr body}"
      mkEq (← mkComp fvar lhs) (← mkComp fvar rhs)

fun x name =>
  let ref :=
    (do
          let a ← name
          pure a.raw).getD
      stx[0];
  let hothmName :=
    match name with
    | some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix
    | x => thm.appendAfter "'";
  (do
        let __do_lift ← getConstInfo thm
        let lvl : List Name := __do_lift.levelParams
        let __do_lift ← liftM (inferType (const thm (List.map mkLevelParam lvl)))
        let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
        let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
        let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
          liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
          let __do_lift ← getRef
          addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
          let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
          addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hsm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames
              (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
            let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
            match __discr with
              | some fcn => do
                let __do_lift ← getEnv
                let hfm : Bool :=
                  PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
                let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
                if hfm = true then do
                    let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
                    __do_jp y
                  else do
                    let y ← pure PUnit.unit
                    __do_jp y
              | x => failure
          if hsm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
        let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
        match __discr with
          | (fst, mvarId) => do
            let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
            let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
            match __discr with

                let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
                match __discr with
                  | (fst, mvarId) => do
                    let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm

                    let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
                    __do_jp y
              | x => do
                let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
                __do_jp y).run'.run'

        let __do_lift ← liftM (inferType (const thm (List.map mkLevelParam lvl)))
        let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
        let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
        let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
          liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
          let __do_lift ← getRef
          addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
          let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
          addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hsm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames
              (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do

            __do_jp y

  if hsm = true then do
      let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
      __do_jp y
    else do
      let y ← pure PUnit.unit
      __do_jp y

fun hot =>
  let __do_jp := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y;
  do
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with

              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")

name: lvl
context.value: __do_lift✝¹.levelParams

term.value:
do
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

| some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix
| x => thm.appendAfter "'"

name: lvl
context.value: __do_lift✝¹.levelParams

term.value:
fun typ => do
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))

    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref

    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))

      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)

          match __discr with

              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption

fun __do_lift => do
  let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

name: ref
context.value:
(do
      let a ← name
      pure a.raw).getD
  stx[0]

name: hothmName
context.value:
match name with
| some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix
| x => thm.appendAfter "'"

name: lvl
context.value: __do_lift✝.levelParams

term.value:
fun __do_lift => do
  let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

context.value:
match name with
| some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix
| x => thm.appendAfter "'"

name: lvl
context.value: __do_lift✝.levelParams

term.value:
do
  let __do_lift ← liftM (inferType (const thm (List.map mkLevelParam lvl)))
  let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

name: hothmName
context.value:
match name with
| some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix

term.value:
fun __do_lift =>
  let lvl := __do_lift.levelParams;
  do
  let __do_lift ← liftM (inferType (const thm (List.map mkLevelParam lvl)))
  let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

do
      let lvl := (← getConstInfo thm).levelParams
      let typ ← instantiateMVars (← inferType <| .const thm (lvl.map mkLevelParam))
      let hot ← mkHigherOrderType typ
      let prf ← do
        let mvar ← mkFreshExprMVar hot
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvar.mvarId!.intros
        let [mvarId] ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst ``funext) | throwError "failed"
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvarId.intro1
        let lmvr ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst thm)
        lmvr.forM fun mv ↦ mv.assumption
        instantiateMVars mvar
      addDecl <| .thmDecl
        { name := hothmName
          levelParams := lvl
          type := hot
          value := prf }
      addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName (← getRef) ref
      addTermInfo' ref (← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName) (isBinder := true)
      let hsm := simpExtension.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains (.decl thm)
      if hsm then
        addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false .global 1000
      let some fcn ← getSimpExtension? `functor_norm | failure
      let hfm := fcn.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains <| .decl thm
      if hfm then
        addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false .global 1000
      return hothmName

match name with

term.value:
do
  let __do_lift ← getConstInfo thm
  let lvl : List Name := __do_lift.levelParams
  let __do_lift ← liftM (inferType (const thm (List.map mkLevelParam lvl)))
  let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
  let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
  let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
    liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
    let __do_lift ← getRef
    addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
    let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
    addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
    let __do_lift ← getEnv
    let hsm : Bool :=
      PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
    let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
      let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
      match __discr with
        | some fcn => do
          let __do_lift ← getEnv
          let hfm : Bool :=
            PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
          let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
          if hfm = true then do
              let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
              __do_jp y
            else do
              let y ← pure PUnit.unit
              __do_jp y
        | x => failure
    if hsm = true then do
        let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
        __do_jp y
      else do
        let y ← pure PUnit.unit
        __do_jp y
  let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
  let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
  match __discr with
    | (fst, mvarId) => do
      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
      let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
      match __discr with
        | [mvarId] => do
          let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
              let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
              let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
              __do_jp y
        | x => do
          let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
          __do_jp y

ref.pp:
do
      let lvl := (← getConstInfo thm).levelParams
      let typ ← instantiateMVars (← inferType <| .const thm (lvl.map mkLevelParam))
      let hot ← mkHigherOrderType typ
      let prf ← do
        let mvar ← mkFreshExprMVar hot
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvar.mvarId!.intros
        let [mvarId] ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst ``funext) | throwError "failed"
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvarId.intro1
        let lmvr ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst thm)
        lmvr.forM fun mv ↦ mv.assumption
        instantiateMVars mvar
      addDecl <| .thmDecl
        { name := hothmName
          levelParams := lvl
          type := hot
          value := prf }
      addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName (← getRef) ref
      addTermInfo' ref (← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName) (isBinder := true)
      let hsm := simpExtension.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains (.decl thm)
      if hsm then
        addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false .global 1000
      let some fcn ← getSimpExtension? `functor_norm | failure
      let hfm := fcn.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains <| .decl thm
      if hfm then
        addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false .global 1000
      return hothmName

name: ref
context.value:
(do
      let a ← name
      pure a.raw).getD
  stx[0]

name: hothmName
context.value:
match name with
| some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix
| x => thm.appendAfter "'"

     ;  with_annotate_term let hothmName :=
      if let some sname := name then
        updatePrefix sname.getId thm.getPrefix
      else
        thm.appendAfter "\'"
     let hothmName :=
      if let some sname := name then
        updatePrefix sname.getId thm.getPrefix
      else
        thm.appendAfter "\'"
     ;  with_annotate_term MetaM.run' <| TermElabM.run' do
      let lvl := (← getConstInfo thm).levelParams
      let typ ← instantiateMVars (← inferType <| .const thm (lvl.map mkLevelParam))
      let hot ← mkHigherOrderType typ
      let prf ← do
        let mvar ← mkFreshExprMVar hot
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvar.mvarId!.intros
        let [mvarId] ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst ``funext) | throwError "failed"
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvarId.intro1
        let lmvr ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst thm)
        lmvr.forM fun mv ↦ mv.assumption
        instantiateMVars mvar
      addDecl <| .thmDecl
        { name := hothmName
          levelParams := lvl
          type := hot
          value := prf }
      addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName (← getRef) ref
      addTermInfo' ref (← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName) (isBinder := true)
      let hsm := simpExtension.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains (.decl thm)
      if hsm then
        addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false .global 1000
      let some fcn ← getSimpExtension? `functor_norm | failure
      let hfm := fcn.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains <| .decl thm
      if hfm then
        addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false .global 1000
      return hothmName

have __discr := stx;
if __discr.isOfKind `Lean.Parser.Attr.higherOrder = true then
  have __discr_1 := __discr.getArg 0;
  have __discr_2 := __discr.getArg 1;
  let yes := fun x name =>
    let ref :=
      (do
            let a ← name
            pure a.raw).getD
        stx[0];
    let hothmName :=
      match name with
      | some sname => sname.getId.updatePrefix thm.getPrefix
      | x => thm.appendAfter "'";
    (do
          let __do_lift ← getConstInfo thm
          let lvl : List Name := __do_lift.levelParams
          let __do_lift ← liftM (inferType (const thm (List.map mkLevelParam lvl)))
          let typ ← instantiateMVars __do_lift
          let hot ← liftM (mkHigherOrderType typ)
          let __do_jp : Expr → TermElabM Name := fun prf => do
            liftM (addDecl (Declaration.thmDecl { name := hothmName, levelParams := lvl, type := hot, value := prf }))
            let __do_lift ← getRef
            addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName __do_lift ref
            let __do_lift ← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName
            addTermInfo' ref __do_lift none none anonymous true
            let __do_lift ← getEnv
            let hsm : Bool :=
              PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState simpExtension __do_lift).lemmaNames
                (Origin.decl thm)
            let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => do
              let __discr ← liftM (getSimpExtension? `functor_norm)
              match __discr with
                | some fcn => do
                  let __do_lift ← getEnv
                  let hfm : Bool :=
                    PersistentHashSet.contains (ScopedEnvExtension.getState fcn __do_lift).lemmaNames (Origin.decl thm)
                  let __do_jp : Unit → TermElabM Name := fun y => pure hothmName
                  if hfm = true then do
                      let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
                      __do_jp y
                    else do
                      let y ← pure PUnit.unit
                      __do_jp y
                | x => failure
            if hsm = true then do
                let y ← liftM (addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false AttributeKind.global 1000)
                __do_jp y
              else do
                let y ← pure PUnit.unit
                __do_jp y
          let mvar ← liftM (mkFreshExprMVar (some hot))
          let __discr ← liftM mvar.mvarId!.intros
          match __discr with
            | (fst, mvarId) => do
              let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst `funext
              let __discr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
              match __discr with
                | [mvarId] => do
                  let __discr ← liftM mvarId.intro1
                  match __discr with
                    | (fst, mvarId) => do
                      let __do_lift ← Term.mkConst thm
                      let lmvr ← liftM (mvarId.apply __do_lift)
                      lmvr.forM fun mv => liftM mv.assumption
                      let y ← instantiateMVars mvar
                      __do_jp y
                | x => do
                  let y ← Lean.throwError (toMessageData "failed")
                  __do_jp y).run'.run';
  if __discr_2.isNone = true then yes () none
  else
    have __discr_3 := __discr_2;
    if __discr_3.matchesNull 1 = true then
      have __discr := __discr_3.getArg 0;

/-- A user attribute that applies to lemmas of the shape `∀ x, f (g x) = h x`.
It derives an auxiliary lemma of the form `f ∘ g = h` for reasoning about higher-order functions.
-/
def higherOrderGetParam (thm : Name) (stx : Syntax) : AttrM Name := do
  match stx with
  | `(attr| higher_order $[$name]?) =>
    let ref := (name : Option Syntax).getD stx[0]
    let hothmName :=
      if let some sname := name then
        updatePrefix sname.getId thm.getPrefix
      else
        thm.appendAfter "\'"
    MetaM.run' <| TermElabM.run' do
      let lvl := (← getConstInfo thm).levelParams
      let typ ← instantiateMVars (← inferType <| .const thm (lvl.map mkLevelParam))
      let hot ← mkHigherOrderType typ
      let prf ← do
        let mvar ← mkFreshExprMVar hot
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvar.mvarId!.intros
        let [mvarId] ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst ``funext) | throwError "failed"
        let (_, mvarId) ← mvarId.intro1
        let lmvr ← mvarId.apply (← mkConst thm)
        lmvr.forM fun mv ↦ mv.assumption
        instantiateMVars mvar
      addDecl <| .thmDecl
        { name := hothmName
          levelParams := lvl
          type := hot
          value := prf }
      addDeclarationRangesFromSyntax hothmName (← getRef) ref
      addTermInfo' ref (← mkConstWithLevelParams hothmName) (isBinder := true)
      let hsm := simpExtension.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains (.decl thm)
      if hsm then
        addSimpTheorem simpExtension hothmName true false .global 1000
      let some fcn ← getSimpExtension? `functor_norm | failure
      let hfm := fcn.getState (← getEnv) |>.lemmaNames.contains <| .decl thm
      if hfm then
        addSimpTheorem fcn hothmName true false .global 1000
      return hothmName
  | _ => throwUnsupportedSyntax
